name: Tossed Green Salad (with Oranges, Avocados and Onions)
recipeInstructions:
Dressing: Combine all ingredients and shake well.
Salad: Pare the oranges, removing all white parts. Peel the avocado and slice into pieces the same size as the oranges. Peel the onion and slice thin. Separate the lettuce into rings. Combine the oranges, onion, and avocado. Pour the dressing over the mixture. Chill covered for several hours or overnight. Tear the cleaned greens into bite-sized pieces. Add the chilled fruit and onion mixture. Toss gently. Taste for seasoning and adjust as needed.
